mapper.select: /* selectMskuwcWithOwnerName */ select concat(A.COMPKEY, A.WAREKEY, A.OWNERKY, A.SKUMKEY) as ROWKEY , A.COMPKEY, A.WAREKEY, A.OWNERKY, A.SKUMKEY, A.SKUDESC , A.MINIQTY, A.SUOMKEY, A.SKUGR01, A.SKUGR02, A.SKUGR04 , A.UPCCODE , ( select OWNAMLC from MOWRMA as B where A.COMPKEY = B.COMPKEY and A.OWNERKY = B.OWNERKY ) as OWNAMLC , FN_COM_TODATE(CREDATE) as CREDATE, FN_COM_TOTIME(CRETIME) as CRETIME, fn_sy_usernam(COMPKEY, CREUSER) as CREUSER , FN_COM_TODATE(LMODATE) as LMODATE, FN_COM_TOTIME(LMOTIME) as LMOTIME, fn_sy_usernam(COMPKEY, LMOUSER) as LMOUSER , A.UPDTCHK from MSKUWC A where A.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} order by A.COMPKEY, A.WAREKEY, A.OWNERKY, A.SKUMKEY, A.SKUDESC

/* selectMskuwcData */ SELECT COMPKEY , WAREKEY , OWNERKY , SKUMKEY , SKUDESC , SKUTYPE , CUSKUKY , CUSKUNM , VDSKUKY , VDSKUNM , SKUSKEY , SKUSDSC , VENDKEY , PACKKEY , TRUNTYP , MINIQTY , SALFQTY , SPUTZON , SPUTLOC , SPIKLOC , VNDFDAY , EANCODE , UPCCODE , SKUGR01 , SKUGR02 , SKUGR03 , SKUGR04 , SKUGR05 , SKUALT1 , SKUALT2 , SKUALT3 , SKUAT01 , SKUAT02 , SKUAT03 , SKUAT04 , SKUAT05 , SGRWEIG , SNEWEIG , SKULENG , SKUWIDH , SKUHEIG , SKUCUBI , SUOMKEY , SKUNOTE , SKUWABC , SKUSTAT FROM MSKUWC WHERE COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} AND SKUMKEY = #{skumkey} AND WAREKEY = #{warekey}

/* selectMpakmaRelations */ select A.COMPKEY, A.WAREKEY, A.TRUNTYP, A.PACKKEY, B.TRUNNAM from MPAKMA A inner join MTUTMA B on A.COMPKEY = B.COMPKEY and A.TRUNTYP = B.TRUNTYP where A.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} and A.PKUSEYN = 'Y' group by A.COMPKEY, A.WAREKEY, A.TRUNTYP, A.PACKKEY, B.TRUNNAM order by A.COMPKEY, A.WAREKEY, A.TRUNTYP, A.PACKKEY, B.TRUNNAM

/* selectMskustSetItemList */ select concat(ST.COMPKEY, ST.WAREKEY, ST.OWNERKY, ST.SKUMKEY) as ROWKEY , ST.COMPKEY, ST.WAREKEY, ST.OWNERKY, ST.SKUMKEY as SKUMKEY , MIWC.SKUDESC as SKUDESC, ST.SBSKUKY, SBWC.SKUDESC as SBSKUDS, ST.SBSTQTY, ST.UOMEKEY , ST.SVENDKY, ST.STUSEYN , FN_COM_TODATE(ST.CREDATE) as CREDATE, FN_COM_TOTIME(ST.CRETIME) as CRETIME, fn_sy_usernam(ST.COMPKEY, ST.CREUSER) as CREUSER , FN_COM_TODATE(ST.LMODATE) as LMODATE, FN_COM_TOTIME(ST.LMOTIME) as LMOTIME, fn_sy_usernam(ST.COMPKEY, ST.LMOUSER) as LMOUSER , ST.UPDTCHK from MSKUST ST inner join MSKUWC MIWC /* 메인 sku name */ on ( MIWC.COMPKEY = ST.COMPKEY and MIWC.WAREKEY = ST.WAREKEY and MIWC.OWNERKY = ST.OWNERKY and MIWC.SKUMKEY = ST.SKUMKEY ) inner join MSKUWC SBWC /* sub(구성품) sku name */ on ( SBWC.COMPKEY = ST.COMPKEY and SBWC.WAREKEY = ST.WAREKEY and SBWC.OWNERKY = ST.OWNERKY and SBWC.SKUMKEY = ST.SBSKUKY ) where ST.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} and ST.WAREKEY = #{warekey} and ST.OWNERKY = #{ownerky} and upper(ST.SKUMKEY) = upper(#{skumkey}) and MIWC.SKUTYPE = 'SET' and SBWC.SKUTYPE = 'KMAT' group by ST.COMPKEY, ST.WAREKEY, ST.OWNERKY, ST.SKUMKEY, ST.SBSKUKY , MIWC.SKUDESC, SBWC.SKUDESC, ST.SBSTQTY, ST.UOMEKEY order by ST.COMPKEY, ST.WAREKEY, ST.OWNERKY, ST.SKUMKEY, ST.SBSKUKY
